title: Vertical Line
description: Single clean vertical stroke.

title: Horizontal Line
description: Single clean horizontal stroke.

title: Cross
description: Two straight strokes crossing at the center.

title: Filled Square
description: A filled colored square whose contour should be extracted once.

title: Filled Triangle
description: A filled colored triangle for clean contour extraction.

title: Filled Circle
description: A filled colored circle that should become one closed contour.

title: House Badge
description: A simple filled house-style badge made of colored regions.

title: Filled Diamond
description: A filled colored diamond for a single clean contour.

title: Geometric Logo
description: Triangle, square, and circle arranged as filled colored logo parts.

title: Monogram Blocks
description: Three separated filled shapes similar to a simple logo mark.

title: Filled Star
description: A filled five-point star for a more presentation-friendly contour demo.

title: Filled Pentagon
description: A filled pentagon that should become one clean polygon contour.

title: Filled Hexagon
description: A filled hexagon that stays simple for the robot to draw.

title: Arrow Badge
description: A filled arrow-shaped badge with one bold contour.

title: Shield Badge
description: A filled shield-style emblem for a single closed outline.

title: Lightning Mark
description: A filled lightning-bolt style symbol with one strong silhouette.

title: Ribbon Badge
description: A filled award-ribbon silhouette with one strong outer contour.

title: Crown
description: A filled crown silhouette that stays clean in both classical and ML extraction.

title: Bookmark
description: A filled bookmark silhouette with a simple notched base.

title: Leaf
description: A clean filled leaf silhouette without inner detail.
